summary: COMPARISON 3-panel: Bertrand's paradox via three sampling methods — random endpoints, radial midpoint, interior midpoint. Each circle has 50 precomputed chords; ValueTracker n_tr grows the sample count via always_redraw, drawing YELLOW chords for length > √3·R, grey otherwise. Live p̂ and theoretical limit 1/3, 1/2, 1/4 below each panel.
